Blocker: Missing mandatory documents — full compliance checklist required
Why_it_matters: All eight statutory documents (or Beställaransvarsdokument alternative) must be attached to the bid; any omission causes rejection
Evidence: Skatteintyg… TyEL… bankgaranti… handelsregistret… ELLER Beställaransvarsdokument… FÖRTECKNINGEN SKA BIFOGAS ANBUDET — Bilageförteckning
Action: Confirm your organisation can produce all eight documents dated within 3 months, or obtain a valid Beställaransvarsdokument as the single alternative
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Documents must not be older than 3 months
Why_it_matters: Any certificate dated before late February 2026 relative to submission date will render the bid non-compliant
Evidence: Utredningarna får inte vara äldre än tre månader — Bilageförteckning
Action: Check issue dates of all held certificates now; order fresh ones immediately where needed
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Named responsible site manager required in bid
Why_it_matters: Bid is technically non-compliant if no named arbetsledare is included; cannot be corrected after submission
Evidence: I anbudet ska en ansvarig arbetsledare anges — Anbudsförfrågan
Action: Identify and confirm a named, qualified site manager before bid is prepared
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Mandatory pre-bid site visit — failure to attend may affect compliance
Why_it_matters: Contractor is explicitly required to visit the site before submitting; pricing without a visit risks non-conforming bid
Evidence: Entreprenören skall bekanta sig med objektet… före inlämnande av anbud — Anbudsförfrågan
Action: Contact Mats Nordgren (+358 504419262) immediately to book a site visit before the questions deadline of 15 May 2026
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Own liability and accident insurance mandatory
Why_it_matters: Contractor must hold and demonstrate its own damage and accident insurance; absence is a compliance failure
Evidence: Entreprenören ska ha egen skade- och olycksfallsförsäkring — Anbudsförfrågan
Action: Confirm current insurance cover and that the certificate can be included in the bid package
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Construction-period bond (10%) and defects liability bond (2%) required
Why_it_matters: Inability to provide either bond prevents contract execution and may disqualify the bid
Evidence: Säkerhet för byggtiden 10%… garantitiden 2%… giltig 27 månader från godkänd slutbesiktning — Anbudsförfrågan
Action: Confirm bond availability with your bank or insurer; obtain indicative costs against est. contract value of €250,000
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Signed list of received drawings must be attached
Why_it_matters: The Förteckning över mottagna ritningar och handlingar must be signed and included; omission is a formal non-compliance
Evidence: Förteckning över mottagna ritningar… VI intygar härmed… FÖRTECKNINGEN SKA BIFOGAS ANBUDET — Förteckning document
Action: Download all listed VVS (16 docs) and EL (6 docs) drawings from Hilma; sign and attach the receipt list to the bid
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed

Blocker: Buyer retains right to reject any bid
Why_it_matters: The contracting authority may accept or reject any offer without obligation; abnormally low bids are at particular risk
Evidence: Beställaren förbehåller sig rätten att godkänna eller förkasta givna anbud — Anbudsförfrågan
Action: Ensure pricing is cost-supported and not aggressively below market; document rationale for all cost items
Preliminary_Go_NoGo: Needs verification — deadline open, but document readiness must be confirmed
